data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Override capability', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the existence or functionality of this override capability. The absence of such evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement, as there is no confirmation that the system can override availability settings as needed.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or functionality of the 'Override capability'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for override capability
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete API calls and assertions that verify the existence and functionality of the override capability.
